name: Ezreal

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Rising Spell Force
passive.description_source: Innate:  Ezreal's abilities generate  stacks of Rising Spell Force for each enemy hit, up to a cap.

effects.description: Innate: Ezreal generates a stack of Rising Spell Force for each enemy hit by his abilities, lasting for 6 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits, and stacking up to 5 times.
Rising Spell Force: For each stack, Ezreal gains 10% bonus attack speed, up to a maximum of 50%.

passive.description: Innate: Ezreal generates a stack of Rising Spell Force for each enemy hit by his abilities, lasting for 6 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits, and stacking up to 5 times.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Rising Spell Force will stack even if the abilities hit were blocked by spell shields.

basic_ability_1.name: Mystic Shot
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Ezreal fires a bolt of energy that deals physical damage to the first enemy hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Ezreal fires a bolt of energy in the target direction that deals physical damage to the first enemy hit, applying on-hit effects and triggering on-attack effects.

effects.description: If Mystic Shot successfully hits an enemy, the current cooldowns of Ezreal's abilities, including Mystic Shot's, are reduced by 1.5 seconds.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Ezreal fires a bolt of energy in the target direction that deals physical damage to the first enemy hit, applying on-hit effects and triggering on-attack effects.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Mystic Shot deals basic damage, but also triggers spell effects by also being tagged as spell damage.

Manual verification (2026-02-24): Mystic Shot is a 0.25-second cast linear projectile that applies on-hit and on-attack effects to the first unit hit and refunds 1.5 seconds from Ezreal ability cooldowns on successful hit, including Mystic Shot itself.
Manual review (2026-02-25): Mystic Shot resolution is first-hit projectile contact, not cast-complete timing.

basic_ability_2.name: Essence Flux
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Ezreal fires an orb that shortly marks the first enemy  champion, epic  monster, or  structure hit.

effects.description: Active: Ezreal fires an orb in the target direction that marks the first enemy champion, epic monster, or structure hit for 4 seconds.

effects.context_notes: His next basic attack or ability against the target detonates the mark to deal them bonus magic damage.

effects.description: If the mark was detonated with an ability, Ezreal restores 60 mana plus the mana cost of that ability.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Ezreal fires an orb in the target direction that marks the first enemy champion, epic monster, or structure hit for 4 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The application of Essence Flux deals 0 proc damage.

basic_ability_3.name: Arcane Shift
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Ezreal  blinks to the target location and fires a bolt that strikes the nearest enemy, dealing magic damage.

effects.context_notes: Active: Ezreal blinks from his current location to up to 475 units towards the target location, then fires a homing bolt towards the nearest enemy that deals magic damage and reveals them for 1 second.

effects.description: Arcane Shift prioritizes firing at the nearest enemy marked by Essence Flux.
The target does not have to be visible to be hit by this ability.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Ezreal blinks from his current location to up to 475 units towards the target location, then fires a homing bolt towards the nearest enemy that deals magic damage and reveals them for 1 second.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): If Ezreal is moved during the cast time, his range to blink will update accordingly.

ultimate.name: Trueshot Barrage
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Ezreal fires a powerful arc of energy that deals magic damage to enemies hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Ezreal fires a powerful arc of energy in the target direction that briefly grants sight of its surroundings and deals magic damage to enemies hit.
Minions and non-epic monsters take 50% reduced damage.

ultimate.description: Active: Ezreal fires a powerful arc of energy in the target direction that briefly grants sight of its surroundings and deals magic damage to enemies hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Trueshot Barrage's projectile has an icon on the mini-map while it is in flight.
Manual review (2026-02-25): Trueshot Barrage is modeled as windup then projectile-hit resolution; damage applies only on unit collision, preserving dodge/block windows before impact.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

sources.type: League of Legends Wiki (ability data template)
sources.used_for: manual behavior verification for Mystic Shot execution timing, activation gating, and player-visible resolution semantics

sources.type: League of Legends Wiki (ability data template)
sources.used_for: manual behavior verification for Trueshot Barrage cast-windup and projectile-hit resolution semantics

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
